body_template: Fourteen miles from the coast, the mill wheels turn slow. Sable Ford lies {miles_to_next} ahead.
The dark water parts. A long stretch to Hallowmere begins — {miles_to_next} of quiet country.
Seventy-three miles walked. The still mere mirrors the peaks to come.
The river doubles back on itself here. Thistlewood waits {miles_to_next} on.
Past the halfway mark, through the wood's thorny heart. Farrow's Rest lies {miles_to_next} ahead.
A warm hearth at last. From here the road climbs toward Stonewash Ford.
White water over pale stone. Rivergate stands {miles_to_next} ahead.
The last gate before the climb. The Windrise Peaks rise {miles_to_next} beyond.
{character} stands at the summit — {total_miles} walked from Wavecrest to the peaks.
